name: Ox - Tail Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the Ox-tails and clean them of any hair. Boil them in enough water to cover, adding salt, pepper, and meat tenderizer.
2. Cook for about 1 1/2 to 2 hours until the Ox-tails are tender.
3. Add the diced potatoes, frozen mixed vegetables, tomato paste, onion (if using), soy sauce (if using), salt, and pepper to the pot.
4. Continue cooking for approximately another 1/2 hour over medium heat in a covered pot.
5. Serve as a soup or over white rice.
